items.name: compose-animations
items.description: ⚡️ A collection of Jetpack Compose animations for the best practices. Tweak literals at the top of any file, save, and watch the motion morph in real-time.

items.name: polymarket-bot
items.description: Advanced Polymarket Bot - Automated trading bot for Polymarket with smart strategies, arbitrage, real-time market monitoring, auto betting and Telegram alerts on Polygon.

items.name: wpf-buddy-mcp
items.description: MCP server that lets AI agents drive, test, and inspect WPF desktop applications through UI Automation. Attach to any running WPF app, explore screens autonomously, explain UI state, and generate regression tests — all via natural language through the Model Context Protocol.

items.name: LiteChat
items.description: LiteChat is forked from llama.cpp WebUI, Make It supports vLLM

items.name: sectorllm
items.description: The world's smallest llama2 inference engine

items.name: opc-skill
items.description: OPC Skill 是一套面向 AI 一人公司（One-Person Company）新手的执行型 Agent Skill 包。它不是课程目录，而是帮你在不同阶段快速判断：现在该读哪个 skill、做什么动作、产出什么结果、何时继续或停止。

items.name: ai-dev-effectiveness
items.description: Measure AI co-programming effectiveness on any git repo. Detects Claude/Copilot/Cursor/Codex signatures and triangulates productivity multipliers via top-down roles, bottom-up formula, and an optional Claude Code subagent that reads diffs.

items.name: raylib-sml
items.description: Raylib Bindings for Moscow ML

items.name: Folio
items.description: Self-hosted personal library — drop PDFs & EPUBs into a folder, get AI-extracted metadata, semantic search, and a clean browser UI. Supports OpenAI, Ollama, and Anthropic.

items.name: prism
items.description: Prism — a one-click desktop LLM gateway. Embeds 37 providers (OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini / Bedrock / …) behind one OpenAI-compatible endpoint, with Cloudflare Tunnel built in. AGPL-3.0.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: GenericAgent-v1-web
items.description: 多模型群聊Agent协作平台 - Web UI

items.name: cursed-repo
items.description: Average JavaScript repo 🫪

items.name: alpha-skills
items.description: AI-powered trading skills for Claude/Gemini agents. Backtesting, edge research, market analysis, strategy design, and more.

items.name: Earthquake
items.description: Earthquake — A high-performance, real-time global seismic intelligence platform. Built with Next.js and Leaflet to provide precision geospatial mapping, live magnitude analytics, and deep seismic event insights.

items.name: OpenGridPK
items.description: Pakistan's transmission grid, on one map. Open data (OSM + PyPSA-Earth) rendered as a static MapLibre site with a monthly auto-refresh.

items.name: phonors
items.description: A Python module implemented in Rust for Phonopy

items.name: dreamer
items.description: Self-evolving context for any coding agent.

items.name: AutoAnswer_ai
items.description: 一款基于 AI 的桌面答题神器。框选屏幕区域，程序自动截图、识别题目文字、解析选项，秒级调用大模型推理出答案，结果直接显示在半透明悬浮窗上——全程无需手动操作。  内置 50+ 条本地知识库，命中即返回，响应低至毫秒级；未命中则调用 DeepSeek API 联网搜索作答，准确率极高。OCR 引擎采用 RapidOCR，无需安装庞大的深度学习框架，开箱即用。  支持全局快捷键一键框选、暂停、手动触发识别，操作丝滑不打断工作流。悬浮窗置顶显示、自动淡出，答案一目了然。  适用于线上知识竞赛、时政学习、模拟测验、趣味问答等场景。轻量、快速、安静，藏在后台帮你拿分的那个队友。

items.name: opensmith
items.description: The open-source, local-first alternative to LangSmith. No cloud. No setup.

items.name: your_WristSense
items.description: 本项目将腕部可穿戴传感器的时序采样（50Hz）组织为一条可复现的流水线：数据清洗 → 切窗/切分 → 特征化（128 维）→ 多模型对比 → 评估与可视化，并提供多个模型家族（传统 ML / 深度学习 / 表格 Transformer）的训练与测试脚本，便于你把它扩展成一个真正“能落地”的手势识别系统。
